title: Simple Grinder
body:
If you don`t love to install large mods like IC2, Mekanism, or Thermal Expansion for multiply ores, then I found a solution!
 
Mod add one block, but its functions are absolutely the same as other crushers.


Modpacks
-Yes, you can use my mod for modpacks

 

Source code

- Yes, use my code! =)
